message: Jake
Yuriko
Eva
Welcome back, Boss. Did you have a chance to talk to Cindy?
Yeah, though I can't shake the feeling I was kind of dodged.
A woman's voice
Dodged? What do you mean?
Eh?!
Hah
I, darling.
I just dropped by since you weren't coming to see me. Hehe.
Huh?
Hehehe, long time no see!
Look
Talk
Listen
System
Look around
About the article
About Cindy
About Guy
Save
Exit the game
It feels like a venomous snake has invaded the usually calm and peaceful Oasis.
seems to be facing the computer as if nothing can be heard.
sitting right in front of me, emphasizing her ample bosom.
is looking at me with a probing gaze.
That straight piercing gaze makes me feel like I'm being seen right through, filling me with anxiety.
Ah! No, I can't hold it in anymore!
About the scoop?
Yes, exactly.
Actually, I've got some solid information on the serial murder case culprit.
Really?
It's true. It's an amazing scoop, right?
But isn't that dangerous?
Oh, I'm fine. I've navigated through rough patches before. But
thank you for worrying.
I think it's best to be cautious since the other person is a murderer.
You're so kind. Hey
how about we heat things up in bed? I'm feeling all tingly down there.
W-who says stupid things like that?!
I'm not being stupid. Come on, it's good, right? Right?
M-move out already!
Oh, you got mad. You're really fun to tease.
Well then, I’ll take my leave. Ciao!
Lately, I’ve been lucky with scoops. Hee hee.
By the way, I just got a scoop today. You’re curious about the content, right?
Not really.
Oh dear, what a pity.
I caught a private detective visiting Cindy's hideout on camera. Hehehe.
You're at it again.
I had a proper reason for going there.
I don't care about that; it's up to the viewers to interpret it how they want.
Last time it was outside the office, and now it’s in the office.
Exactly, I’m making progress every day too.
What did you come here for today?
Oh, it’s sad to see such a tense mood suddenly.
I don’t want to get too close.
Oh dear.
Well, I want to get a lot closer! Hee hee!
Have you written the article about me yet?
Oh, so you actually want it to be a proper article?
No way, if that happens I’ll take you to court for violating my rights.
I knew you'd come at me with that. Don't worry, relax. Just writing about a private citizen wouldn't create any buzz, so that's off the table.
Right now, it seems like I might get a more interesting scoop.
A more interesting scoop? Another entertainment scandal or something?
Are you making fun of me? It's not like that, it's a big scoop, a big scoop!
What's the content?
I won't tell you something like that.
Hehe.
The scoop of the century is coming soon.
Hehehe.
It seems like you've been meeting Cindy lately, but what's really going on? It's not a love romance, right?
Even if you ask what it is...
They're not even someone a regular person would be friends with. I want to know the real reason, please!
That's a conversation I can't have.
Well, fine. I will definitely find out what’s hidden behind this.
By the way, how did you meet Cindy?
No comment. If you don't leave quickly, I’ll call the police.
Don't say things you don't mean.
For now, it seems like you know more about Cindy than I do. It's frustrating.
By the way, can you finally tell me about Guy?
No way, if I spill that, then I'll miss out on the...
scoop.
Miss the scoop!? That's a mystery.
Sorry, but since I've waited this long, just hold on a little longer.
Right now, I can't talk about it no matter what. But I’ll tell you for sure that Cindy and I are unrelated.
I still don't have a clue.
That's fine, that’s how a good reader should be.
Guy is...
It's a secret.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
